summary: Iteration 18: Complete verification of new SportLyo features. Homepage: 3 sections verified (Explorez par sport with 5 categories + correct counts, Trouvez votre défi with 6 themed cards with correct colors/icons, Événements populaires with 6 event cards). Event detail page: All new sections verified (Épreuves with participant counters, Parcours OpenRunner embed, Map with exact address, Règlement expandable section, Thématiques badges, Circuit type display, Chronométreur status, Liens sociaux section, Organisé par section). Organizer dashboard: 6 events displayed in animated card grid. Backend: All 6 events have complete data (themes, circuit_type, has_timer, races, exact_address, regulations, social URLs).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18: All features verified. Homepage has 3 main sections: 1) Explorez par sport (5 sport categories with data-testid=category-{sport}), 2) Trouvez votre défi (6 theme cards with data-testid=theme-{name} using colored backgrounds), 3) Événements populaires (6 event cards with data-testid=event-card-{id}). Event detail page sections: races-section (Épreuves disponibles), route-section (Parcours OpenRunner), map-section (Lieu de départ), regulations-section (Règlement), event-meta-section (themes/circuit/timer), social-links-section (Liens sociaux), organizer-section. Organizer dashboard accessible at /dashboard/organizer after login.
